title: Elbaf’s Hidden Corners
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Gerd, Robin, Loki, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I will wipe you all out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elder JARUL!! A fire has broken out in the south!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I heard a horn Blare, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This is bad!! Put it out!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: All these monsters... I recognize them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's LOK!! He can use his hammer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Nuh-uh!! The one who's gonna do that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I drew LOK! 'Cause he's the scariest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No way!! Ferrir is the most frightening!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But these drawing and writing exercises really let your personalities shine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each of you has a unique perspective, and your imaginations are amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...are the things the kids fear the most!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
